text:
浮上施設は見通しがよく
警戒しやすい場所、と思われがちだが
油断は禁物だ。

水上艦や大型海王種が
いつ現れるか、わからないからな。
慎重、かつ大胆に

The Floating Facility has great visibility,
which may deceive you into false vigilance.
Never let down your guard.

We never know when surface ships or giant
Oceanids may appear. Let's proceed boldly,
but with caution.
